Resource Profile: AS PractitionerRole Profile

Official URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-practitionerrole Version: 0.0.3
Active as of 2023-04-17 Computable Name: ASPractitionerRoleProfile

Profil créé à partir de la ressource PractitionerRole dans le contexte de l’Annuaire Santé pour décrire l’exercice professionel et la situation d’exercice contient les informations décrivant notamment la profession exercée, l’identité d’exercice d’un professionnel, le cadre de son exercice (civil, militaire, etc.) ainsi que les caractéristiques de l’exercice d’un professionnel pendant une période déterminée et dans une structure déterminée.

Usage:

  • This Resource Profile is not used by any profiles in this Implementation Guide

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description of Profiles, Differentials, Snapshots and how the different presentations work.

  • Text Summary
  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Snapshot Table (Must Support)
  • All

This structure is derived from PractitionerRole

Summary

Mandatory: 1 element
Must-Support: 45 elements
Prohibited: 1 element

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • As Location Profile (http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-location)
  • CodeableConceptTimed (https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/codeableConcept-timed)
  • FrContactPoint (http://interopsante.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/FrContactPoint)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-name
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-registration
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-educationLevel
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-smartCard
  • http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element PractitionerRole.code.coding is sliced based on the value of value:system
  • The element PractitionerRole.specialty is sliced based on the value of value:coding.system

This structure is derived from PractitionerRole

​ Slices for coding 0..*CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:system
​ coding:CategorieProfession S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J89-CategorieProfessionnelle-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J89-CategorieProfessionnelle-RASS (required): Catégories professionnelles dans le RASS

​ coding:professionG15 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions du RASS

​ system 0..1uriProfessions de santé définies par le code de la santé publique
​ coding:professionR94 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions du RASS

​ system 0..1uriProfession du social
​ coding:professionR95 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions du RASS

​ system 0..1uriUsager de titre professionnel
​ coding:professionR291 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions du RASS

​ system 0..1uriListe de professionnels non membres d'une profession réglementée
​ coding:genreActivite S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J94-GenreActivite-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J94-GenreActivite-RASS (required): Le genre d'activité identifie les activités qui nécessitent l’application de règles de gestion spécifiques

​ coding:modeExercice S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J95-ModeExercice-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J95-ModeExercice-RASS (required): Le mode d'exercice décrit selon quelle modalité une activité est exercée au regard de l'organisation de la rétribution du professionnel

​ coding:typeActiviteLiberale S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J96-TypeActiviteLiberale-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J96-TypeActiviteLiberale-RASS (required): Type d’activité libérale, par exemple: Cabinet; Secteur privé à l'hôpital

​ coding:statutProfessionnelSSA S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J97-StatutProfessionnelSSA-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J97-StatutProfessionnelSSA-RASS (required): Statut du professionnel du Service de santé des armées

​ coding:statutHospitalier S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J98-StatutHospitalier-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J98-StatutHospitalier-RASS (required): Statut hospitalier dans le cas d’une activité exercée en établissement public de santé

​ coding:fonctionR21 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS (required): Ensemble des fonctions et rôles du professionel au sein de la stucture d'exercice

​ system 0..1uriFonction
​ coding:fonctionR96 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS (required): Ensemble des fonctions et rôles du professionel au sein de la stucture d'exercice

​ system 0..1uriAutres fonctions du domaine sanitaire
​ coding:fonctionR85 S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS (required): Ensemble des fonctions et rôles du RASS, https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS

​ system 0..1uriRôle dans la prise en charge des patients ou des usagers

​ system 0..1uriSous-section ou à défaut section du tableau de l’Ordre des pharmaciens.

​ location S0..*Reference(As Location Profile) {c}The location(s) at which this practitioner provides care
​ healthcareService S0..*Reference(HealthcareService)The list of healthcare services that this worker provides for this role's Organization/Location(s)
​ telecom S0..*FrContactPointDetails of a Technology mediated contact point (phone, fax, email, etc.)
​ availableTime S0..*BackboneElementTimes the Service Site is available
​ notAvailable S0..*BackboneElementNot available during this time due to provided reason
​ availabilityExceptions S0..1stringDescription of availability exceptions
​ endpoint S0..*Reference(Endpoint)Technical endpoints providing access to services operated for the practitioner with this role

AllLanguagesMax Binding
text N0..1NarrativeText summary of the resource, for human interpretation

Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
assemblyOrder N0..1codePreferred display order of name parts
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order
Binding: HumanNameAssemblyOrder (required): A code that represents the preferred display order of the components of a human name.


use ?!ΣN0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
Binding: NameUse (required): The use of a human name.

text ΣN0..1stringText representation of the full name
family ΣN0..1stringFamily name (often called 'Surname')
given ΣN0..*stringGiven names (not always 'first'). Includes middle names
This repeating element order: Given Names appear in the correct order for presenting the name
prefix ΣN0..1stringParts that come before the name
Binding: http://mos.asipsante.fr/NOS/TABS/JDV_J78-Civilite-RASS.tabs (required): JDV_J78-Civilite-RASS


This repeating element order: Prefixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
suffix ΣN0..*stringjeu de valeurs pour spécifier le titre de la personne
Binding: http://mos.asipsante.fr/NOS/TABS/JDV_J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS.tabs (extensible): JDV_J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS


This repeating element order: Suffixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when name was/is in use

Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

system ΣN0..1uriThe namespace for the identifier value
Fixed Value: urn:oid:1.2.250.1.213.1.6.4.1
value ΣN0..1stringThe value that is unique
Example General: 123456
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
assigner ΣCN0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
display ΣN0..1stringText alternative for the resource
url 1..1uri"https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-educationLevel"
practitionerRole-smartCard S0..1(Complex)Optional Extensions Element
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-smartCard
as-mailbox-mss S0..1(Complex)AS Mailbox MSS Extension
URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss
id S0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
extension:value S0..1ExtensionBAL MSS
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"value"
value[x] 0..1stringValue of extension
extension:type S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"type"
Slices for value[x] 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
value[x]:valueCodeableConcept 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J139-TypeBAL-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J139-TypeBAL-RASS (required): Type de boîte aux lettre MSS

extension:description S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"description"
value[x] 0..1stringDescription fonctionnelle de la boîte aux lettres
extension:responsible S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"responsible"
value[x] 0..1stringTexte libre donnant les coordonnées de la (ou des) personne(s) responsable(s) au niveau opérationnel de la boîte aux lettres. Non renseigné pour les types de boîte aux lettres "PER".
extension:service S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"service"
Slices for value[x] 0..1stringValue of extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
value[x]:valueString 0..1stringNom et description du service de rattachement de l’utilisateur de la boîte aux lettres dans l’organisation.
extension:phone S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"phone"
Slices for value[x] 0..1stringValue of extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
value[x]:valueString 0..1stringCoordonnées téléphoniques spécifiques à l’usage de la boîte aux lettres MSSanté
extension:digitization S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"digitization"
Slices for value[x] 0..1booleanValue of extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
value[x]:valueBoolean 0..1booleanIndicateur d’acceptation de la dématérialisation (ou « Zéro papier »
extension:publication S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"publication"
Slices for value[x] 0..1booleanValue of extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
value[x]:valueBoolean 0..1booleanndicateur liste rouge
extension:date S0..*ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"date"
value[x] 0..1MetaValue of extension
url 1..1uri"http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss"
modifierExtension ?!N0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
identifier SΣ0..*IdentifierBusiness Identifiers that are specific to a role/location
active ΣN0..1booleanWhether this practitioner role record is in active use
period SΣC0..1PeriodThe period during which the practitioner is authorized to perform in these role(s)
practitioner ΣC1..1Reference(Practitioner)Practitioner that is able to provide the defined services for the organization
organization ΣCN0..1Reference(Organization)Organization where the roles are available
code ΣN0..*CodeableConceptRoles which this practitioner may perform
Binding: PractitionerRole (example): The role a person plays representing an organization.


id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
Slices for coding Σ0..*CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:system

coding:modeExercice SΣ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J95-ModeExercice-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J95-ModeExercice-RASS (required): Le mode d'exercice décrit selon quelle modalité une activité est exercée au regard de l'organisation de la rétribution du professionnel


coding:typeActiviteLiberale SΣ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J96-TypeActiviteLiberale-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J96-TypeActiviteLiberale-RASS (required): Type d’activité libérale, par exemple: Cabinet; Secteur privé à l'hôpital

id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
coding ΣN0..*CodingCode defined by a terminology system
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
system Σ0..1uriType savoir faire
version ΣN0..1stringVersion of the system - if relevant
code ΣN0..1codeSymbol in syntax defined by the system
display ΣN0..1stringRepresentation defined by the system
userSelected ΣN0..1booleanIf this coding was chosen directly by the user
text ΣN0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
location SΣC0..*Reference(As Location Profile) {c}The location(s) at which this practitioner provides care
healthcareService SC0..*Reference(HealthcareService)The list of healthcare services that this worker provides for this role's Organization/Location(s)
telecom SC0..*FrContactPointDetails of a Technology mediated contact point (phone, fax, email, etc.)
availableTime S0..*BackboneElementTimes the Service Site is available
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
modifierExtension ?!ΣN0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
daysOfWeek N0..*codemon | tue | wed | thu | fri | sat | sun
Binding: DaysOfWeek (required): The days of the week.


allDay N0..1booleanAlways available? e.g. 24 hour service
availableStartTime N0..1timeOpening time of day (ignored if allDay = true)
availableEndTime N0..1timeClosing time of day (ignored if allDay = true)
notAvailable S0..*BackboneElementNot available during this time due to provided reason
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
modifierExtension ?!ΣN0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
description N1..1stringReason presented to the user explaining why time not available
during CN0..1PeriodService not available from this date
availabilityExceptions S0..1stringDescription of availability exceptions
endpoint SC0..*Reference(Endpoint)Technical endpoints providing access to services operated for the practitioner with this role

Documentation for this format
NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
​ PractitionerRole 0..*PractitionerRoleRoles/organizations the practitioner is associated with
​ practitionerRole-name 0..*FrHumanNameOptional Extensions Element
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-name
​ id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
​ PractitionerRoleRegistration 0..*(Complex)Optional Extensions Element
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-registration
​ extension:registeringOrganizationDetail 0..1ExtensionExtension
​ extension:period 0..1ExtensionExtension
​ extension:status 0..1ExtensionExtension
​ extension:hostingDepartment 0..1ExtensionExtension
​ extension:isFirst 0..1ExtensionExtension
​ practitionerRole-educationLevel 0..1(Complex)Optional Extensions Element
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-educationLevel
​ id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
​ extension:academicDegree 0..1ExtensionExtension
​ extension:achievedLevel 0..1ExtensionExtension
​ extension:academicYear 0..1ExtensionExtension
​ extension:period 0..1ExtensionExtension
​ extension:issuer 0..1ExtensionExtension
​ practitionerRole-smartCard 0..1(Complex)Optional Extensions Element
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-smartCard

Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions du RASS

Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J106-EnsembleProfession-RASS (required): Ensemble des professions du RASS

​ coding:typeActiviteLiberale Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J96-TypeActiviteLiberale-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J96-TypeActiviteLiberale-RASS (required): Type d’activité libérale, par exemple: Cabinet; Secteur privé à l'hôpital

Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J97-StatutProfessionnelSSA-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J97-StatutProfessionnelSSA-RASS (required): Statut du professionnel du Service de santé des armées

Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J98-StatutHospitalier-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J98-StatutHospitalier-RASS (required): Statut hospitalier dans le cas d’une activité exercée en établissement public de santé


​ coding:fonctionR21 Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS (required): Ensemble des fonctions et rôles du professionel au sein de la stucture d'exercice


​ coding:fonctionR96 Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS (required): Ensemble des fonctions et rôles du professionel au sein de la stucture d'exercice


​ coding:fonctionR85 Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS (required): Ensemble des fonctions et rôles du RASS, https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J108-EnsembleFonction-RASS


​ coding:metierPharmacienR06 Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS (required): Ensemble des sections et sous-sections du tableau du CNOP dans le RASS, https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS


​ coding:metierPharmacienG05 Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS (required): Ensemble des sections et sous-sections du tableau du CNOP dans le RASS, https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J73-MetierPharmacien-RASS


​ location ΣC0..*Reference(As Location Profile) {c}The location(s) at which this practitioner provides care
​ healthcareService C0..*Reference(HealthcareService)The list of healthcare services that this worker provides for this role's Organization/Location(s)
​ telecom C0..*FrContactPointDetails of a Technology mediated contact point (phone, fax, email, etc.)
​ availableTime 0..*BackboneElementTimes the Service Site is available
​ notAvailable 0..*BackboneElementNot available during this time due to provided reason
​ availabilityExceptions 0..1stringDescription of availability exceptions
​ endpoint C0..*Reference(Endpoint)Technical endpoints providing access to services operated for the practitioner with this role

Documentation for this format

This structure is derived from PractitionerRole

Summary

Mandatory: 1 element
Must-Support: 45 elements
Prohibited: 1 element

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • As Location Profile (http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-location)
  • CodeableConceptTimed (https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/codeableConcept-timed)
  • FrContactPoint (http://interopsante.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/FrContactPoint)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-name
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-registration
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-educationLevel
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-smartCard
  • http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element PractitionerRole.code.coding is sliced based on the value of value:system
  • The element PractitionerRole.specialty is sliced based on the value of value:coding.system

Differential View

This structure is derived from PractitionerRole

Snapshot View

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
PractitionerRole 0..*PractitionerRoleRoles/organizations the practitioner is associated with
id Σ0..1idLogical id of this artifact
meta ΣN0..1MetaMetadata about the resource
implicitRules ?!ΣN0..1uriA set of rules under which this content was created
language N0..1codeLanguage of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.

Additional BindingsPurpose
AllLanguagesMax Binding
text N0..1NarrativeText summary of the resource, for human interpretation
contained 0..*AsLocationProfileDetails and position information for a physical place
Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
practitionerRole-name 0..*FrHumanNameOptional Extensions Element
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-name
id S0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-name"
value[x] N0..1FrHumanNameName of a human - parts and usage
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
assemblyOrder N0..1codePreferred display order of name parts
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order
Binding: HumanNameAssemblyOrder (required): A code that represents the preferred display order of the components of a human name.


use ?!ΣN0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
Binding: NameUse (required): The use of a human name.

text ΣN0..1stringText representation of the full name
family ΣN0..1stringFamily name (often called 'Surname')
given ΣN0..*stringGiven names (not always 'first'). Includes middle names
This repeating element order: Given Names appear in the correct order for presenting the name
prefix ΣN0..1stringParts that come before the name
Binding: http://mos.asipsante.fr/NOS/TABS/JDV_J78-Civilite-RASS.tabs (required): JDV_J78-Civilite-RASS


This repeating element order: Prefixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
suffix ΣN0..*stringjeu de valeurs pour spécifier le titre de la personne
Binding: http://mos.asipsante.fr/NOS/TABS/JDV_J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS.tabs (extensible): JDV_J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS


This repeating element order: Suffixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when name was/is in use

URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-registration

extension:issuer S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing

Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
url 1..1uri"issuer"
value[x] N0..1Reference(Organization)Value of extension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
reference ΣCN0..1stringLiteral reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL
type ΣN0..1uriType the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
Binding: ResourceType (extensible): Aa resource (or, for logical models, the URI of the logical model).

identifier ΣN0..1IdentifierLogical reference, when literal reference is not known
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!ΣN0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type ΣN0..1CodeableConceptDescription of identifier
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

system ΣN0..1uriThe namespace for the identifier value
Fixed Value: urn:oid:1.2.250.1.213.1.6.4.1
value ΣN0..1stringThe value that is unique
Example General: 123456
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
assigner ΣCN0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
display ΣN0..1stringText alternative for the resource
url 1..1uri"https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-educationLevel"
practitionerRole-smartCard S0..1(Complex)Optional Extensions Element
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitionerRole-smartCard
as-mailbox-mss S0..1(Complex)AS Mailbox MSS Extension
URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss
id S0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
extension:value S0..1ExtensionBAL MSS
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"value"
value[x] 0..1stringValue of extension
extension:type S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"type"
Slices for value[x] 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
value[x]:valueCodeableConcept 0..1CodeableConceptValue of extension
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J139-TypeBAL-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J139-TypeBAL-RASS (required): Type de boîte aux lettre MSS

extension:description S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"description"
value[x] 0..1stringDescription fonctionnelle de la boîte aux lettres
extension:responsible S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"responsible"
value[x] 0..1stringTexte libre donnant les coordonnées de la (ou des) personne(s) responsable(s) au niveau opérationnel de la boîte aux lettres. Non renseigné pour les types de boîte aux lettres "PER".
extension:service S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"service"
Slices for value[x] 0..1stringValue of extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
value[x]:valueString 0..1stringNom et description du service de rattachement de l’utilisateur de la boîte aux lettres dans l’organisation.
extension:phone S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"phone"
Slices for value[x] 0..1stringValue of extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
value[x]:valueString 0..1stringCoordonnées téléphoniques spécifiques à l’usage de la boîte aux lettres MSSanté
extension:digitization S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"digitization"
Slices for value[x] 0..1booleanValue of extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
value[x]:valueBoolean 0..1booleanIndicateur d’acceptation de la dématérialisation (ou « Zéro papier »
extension:publication S0..1ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"publication"
Slices for value[x] 0..1booleanValue of extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
value[x]:valueBoolean 0..1booleanndicateur liste rouge
extension:date S0..*ExtensionExtension
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0
url 1..1uri"date"
value[x] 0..1MetaValue of extension
url 1..1uri"http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss"
modifierExtension ?!N0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
identifier SΣ0..*IdentifierBusiness Identifiers that are specific to a role/location
active ΣN0..1booleanWhether this practitioner role record is in active use
period SΣC0..1PeriodThe period during which the practitioner is authorized to perform in these role(s)
practitioner ΣC1..1Reference(Practitioner)Practitioner that is able to provide the defined services for the organization
organization ΣCN0..1Reference(Organization)Organization where the roles are available
code ΣN0..*CodeableConceptRoles which this practitioner may perform
Binding: PractitionerRole (example): The role a person plays representing an organization.


id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url

Slice: Unordered, Open by value:system

coding:genreActivite SΣ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J94-GenreActivite-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J94-GenreActivite-RASS (required): Le genre d'activité identifie les activités qui nécessitent l’application de règles de gestion spécifiques


coding:modeExercice SΣ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J95-ModeExercice-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J95-ModeExercice-RASS (required): Le mode d'exercice décrit selon quelle modalité une activité est exercée au regard de l'organisation de la rétribution du professionnel


coding:typeActiviteLiberale SΣ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J96-TypeActiviteLiberale-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J96-TypeActiviteLiberale-RASS (required): Type d’activité libérale, par exemple: Cabinet; Secteur privé à l'hôpital


coding:statutProfessionnelSSA SΣ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J97-StatutProfessionnelSSA-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J97-StatutProfessionnelSSA-RASS (required): Statut du professionnel du Service de santé des armées


coding:statutHospitalier SΣ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system

system Σ0..1uriDroit d'exercice complémentaire.
version ΣN0..1stringVersion of the system - if relevant
code ΣN0..1codeSymbol in syntax defined by the system
display ΣN0..1stringRepresentation defined by the system
userSelected ΣN0..1booleanIf this coding was chosen directly by the user
text ΣN0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
specialty:savoirFaireG13 Σ0..*CodeableConceptSpecific specialty of the practitioner
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J107-EnsembleSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Ensemble des savoir-faire et compétences du RASS


id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url

extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
system Σ0..1uriOrientation particulière
version ΣN0..1stringVersion of the system - if relevant
code ΣN0..1codeSymbol in syntax defined by the system
display ΣN0..1stringRepresentation defined by the system
userSelected ΣN0..1booleanIf this coding was chosen directly by the user
text ΣN0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
specialty:typeSavoirFaire Σ0..*CodeableConceptSpecific specialty of the practitioner
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J91-TypeSavoirFaire-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J91-TypeSavoirFaire-RASS (required): Le type de savoir-faire (qualifications/autres attributions)


id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
coding ΣN0..*CodingCode defined by a terminology system
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
system Σ0..1uriType savoir faire
version ΣN0..1stringVersion of the system - if relevant
code ΣN0..1codeSymbol in syntax defined by the system
display ΣN0..1stringRepresentation defined by the system
userSelected ΣN0..1booleanIf this coding was chosen directly by the user
text ΣN0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
location SΣC0..*Reference(As Location Profile) {c}The location(s) at which this practitioner provides care
healthcareService SC0..*Reference(HealthcareService)The list of healthcare services that this worker provides for this role's Organization/Location(s)
telecom SC0..*FrContactPointDetails of a Technology mediated contact point (phone, fax, email, etc.)
availableTime S0..*BackboneElementTimes the Service Site is available
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
modifierExtension ?!ΣN0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
daysOfWeek N0..*codemon | tue | wed | thu | fri | sat | sun
Binding: DaysOfWeek (required): The days of the week.


allDay N0..1booleanAlways available? e.g. 24 hour service
availableStartTime N0..1timeOpening time of day (ignored if allDay = true)
availableEndTime N0..1timeClosing time of day (ignored if allDay = true)
notAvailable S0..*BackboneElementNot available during this time due to provided reason
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
modifierExtension ?!ΣN0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
description N1..1stringReason presented to the user explaining why time not available
during CN0..1PeriodService not available from this date
availabilityExceptions S0..1stringDescription of availability exceptions
endpoint SC0..*Reference(Endpoint)Technical endpoints providing access to services operated for the practitioner with this role

Documentation for this format

 

Other representations of profile: CSV, Excel, Schematron

Constraints

IdGradePath(s)DetailsRequirements
cpt-2errorPractitionerRole.telecomA system is required if a value is provided.
: value.empty() or system.exists()
dom-2errorPractitionerRole.containedIf the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources
: contained.contained.empty()
dom-3errorPractitionerRole.containedIf the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource
: contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4errorPractitionerRole.containedIf a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated
: contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5errorPractitionerRole.containedIf a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label
: contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6best practicePractitionerRole.containedA resource should have narrative for robust management
: text.`div`.exists()
ele-1error**ALL** elementsAll FHIR elements must have a @value or children
: hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1error**ALL** elementsMust have either extensions or value[x], not both
: extension.exists() != value.exists()
per-1errorPractitionerRole.extension:practitionerRole-name.value[x].period, PractitionerRole.extension:practitionerRole-educationLevel.extension:issuer.value[x].identifier.period, PractitionerRole.period, PractitionerRole.notAvailable.duringIf present, start SHALL have a lower value than end
: start.hasValue().not() or end.hasValue().not() or (start <= end)
ref-1errorPractitionerRole.extension:practitionerRole-educationLevel.extension:issuer.value[x].identifier.assigner, PractitionerRole.practitioner, PractitionerRole.organization, PractitionerRole.location, PractitionerRole.healthcareService, PractitionerRole.endpointSHALL have a contained resource if a local reference is provided
: reference.startsWith('#').not() or (reference.substring(1).trace('url') in %rootResource.contained.id.trace('ids'))
